root.sql:
SELECT vr_nsk_010_008005.monthly_date, vr_nsk_010_008005.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_008005.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_008005.mem_type_code, vr_nsk_010_008005.mem_type_desc, vr_nsk_010_008005.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_008005.member_group_name, vr_nsk_010_008005.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_008005.deposit_account_name, vr_nsk_010_008005.deposit_type_code, vr_nsk_010_008005.deposit_name, vr_nsk_010_008005.deposit_account_no, vr_nsk_010_008005.deposit_balance, vr_nsk_010_008005.int_arrear FROM vr_nsk_010_008005 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where vr_nsk_010_008005.monthly_date = '!monthly_date_1!' and vr_nsk_010_008005.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
/*WHERE*/
